summary: A direct, transitional 4-3-3 that counters at speed and defends a central block. A very exciting time for the country, now on the biggest stage.
style: 4-3-3 (or variation) — direct and transitional play, counter at speed, in behind/wide and cross, with a central block structure.
strengths: Direct running in behind and crossing from wide

keyPlayers.name: Noah Sadiki
keyPlayers.note: Drives with the ball, tough-tackling duel-winner

tactics: Defend the centre, break directly at speed, and get in behind and cross. A very exciting moment for the country on the biggest stage of all.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
